verify.headline: Two-Factor Authentication
verify.description: Please enter the code from your authenticator app or the code sent to your email address.
verify.invalidCode: The code was invalid or has expired. Please try again.
verify.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again.

emailOtp.headline: One-Time Password via Email
emailOtp.description: Each login will require a one-time code sent to your registered email address.

totp.headline: Authenticator App (TOTP)
totp.description: Use any TOTP-compatible authenticator app (e.g. Authy, Google Authenticator) to generate login codes.
totp.scanInstruction: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the six-digit code below to confirm.
totp.manualEntryLabel: Cannot scan? Enter this key manually:
totp.invalidCode: The code was invalid or has expired. Please try again.
